name: Redis Cloud
description: Managed Redis database service. Monitor subscriptions and database instances.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Redis Cloud at https://app.redislabs.com
2. Go to Access Management → API Keys
3. Copy your Account Key and Secret Key
4. Paste both below

credentialFields.label: Account Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Redis Cloud console → Access Management → API Keys → Account Key

credentialFields.label: User Secret Key
credentialFields.helpText: The secret key associated with your account key.

checks.name: Redis Cloud App Availability
checks.description: Checks that the Redis Cloud API is accessible.

checks.name: Redis Cloud Employee Access
checks.description: Verifies employee access to Redis Cloud.
